turns.content: Begin the session now with a short, warm, one or two sentence greeting that welcomes me and gently invites me to share what's on my mind. Keep it light — do not ask anything heavy yet.
"Welcome to our session today! I'm here to listen and support you in any way I can. What's been on your mind lately, and how are you feeling about coming in today?"
"That sounds a bit uncertain. Can you tell me a bit more about what's been going on that's got you feeling that way?"
